title: Quran, Sura 86: At-Tariq
description: Sura 86 (At-Tariq: The Morning Star) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 86 (At-Tariq: The Morning Star) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the sky and the night comer — and what can make you know what is the night comer? It is the piercing star.
